narrative:
Precinct Pleasant Hill 1 (precinct in Jefferson County) has 730 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
